common.copyright: 2026 Semantic Vision - Building Vocabulary, One Story at a Time

landing.title: Semantic Vision
landing.heroDesc: Semantic Vision generates personalized AI stories that teach vocabulary, reflect your family's culture and values, and seamlessly weave real brands as problem-solving heroes inside the narrative.
landing.learnIn20: Your child can learn in 20+ languages
landing.philosophyDesc: Reading increases vocabulary. Vocabulary is how you understand the world — it's vision for your mind. Semantic Vision harnesses AI to build that vision, one personalized story at a time — stories that honor who you are, where you come from, and what you believe.
landing.howItWorksTitle: Three steps to a new world of words
landing.step1Desc: Tell us about your child — age, interests, belief system, cultural background, and language. We listen deeply.
landing.step2Desc: Our engine picks vocabulary from the 60/30/10 tier system, selects eligible brand sponsors, and builds a 5-chapter story personalized to your child.
landing.step3Desc: Your child reads chapters, answers comprehension checks, masters new words — and gains vision to see the whole world.
landing.brandsHeroes: Brands become heroes inside the story
landing.brandsDesc: Our AI doesn't show ads. It weaves real products into the narrative as solutions to problems the characters face. A character needs healthy energy? A real snack brand saves the day. Need to build something? A real tool brand appears naturally. It's education meets ethical sponsorship — and it's unlike anything else on the market.
landing.brandCheck1: Guardian consent required — you control what your child sees
landing.brandCheck3: Real-time budget tracking and impression economics
landing.brandCheck4: Products appear as narrative solutions, never as ads
landing.cultureTitle: Stories that honor who you are
landing.cultureDesc: Semantic Vision is the only platform where your child's stories reflect their faith, cultural heritage, and mother tongue. Whatever your family's religious tradition or worldview, the AI adapts the narrative's values, settings, and lessons to honor your beliefs and way of life.
landing.superpowersTitle: Stories that know your child's superpowers and help them grow
landing.superpowersDesc1: As a parent, you know your child better than anyone. You know they're brilliant at art but struggle with patience. You know they lead their friends but need help sharing. Semantic Vision lets you tell the AI exactly that.
landing.superpowersDesc2: The AI weaves your child's strengths into the story as the hero's superpowers — and gently models growth in their weak areas through the character's journey. Combined with their interests, beliefs, culture, vocabulary goals, and even real brand products — every story is as unique as your child.
landing.superpowerCheck2: Growth areas are modeled with empathy, never shame
landing.superpowerCheck3: Combined with beliefs, culture, interests & vocabulary
landing.superpowerCheck4: Every story is one-of-a-kind — just like your child
landing.vocabDesc: Every story distributes vocabulary across three tiers — reinforcing mastery, building growth, and inspiring aspiration.
landing.baselineDesc: Foundation words your child already knows — reinforced for lasting mastery.
landing.targetDesc: Growth words just above their level — the sweet spot for learning.
landing.stretchDesc: Challenge words that inspire curiosity and expand the horizon.
landing.roleParentsDesc: Manage students, assign word banks, control ad preferences, track progress, earn referral rewards.
landing.roleStudentsDesc: Read AI stories, master vocabulary through comprehension checks, and level up your vision of the world.
landing.roleTeachersDesc: Create live classroom sessions, track cohort progress, and run real-time vocabulary exercises over WebSocket.
landing.roleBrandsDesc: Fund education while marketing ethically. Your products appear as story solutions, not banner ads.
landing.ctaTitle: Give your child the gift of vision
landing.ctaDesc: Join thousands of families who are building vocabulary through personalized, culturally respectful AI stories.
landing.copyright: 2026 Semantic Vision. Building vocabulary, one story at a time.
